artists.name: Sol del Andes
artists.bio: Sol del Andes blends traditional Andean pan flutes, charango, and modern electronic textures for expansive, danceable sets that celebrate mountain cultures of Peru and Bolivia.

artists.name: Midnight Qawwali Collective
artists.bio: Led by vocalist Ayesha Khan, Midnight Qawwali Collective revives the ecstatic Sufi qawwali tradition with harmonium, tabla, and soaring group vocals.

artists.name: Seattle Samba Society
artists.bio: A community bateria bringing Rio-style samba, carnival rhythms, and colorful dancers to the Pacific Northwest.

artists.name: Cascadia Klezmer Band
artists.bio: Clarinet, fiddle, and accordion drive this joyful ensemble that reimagines Eastern European Jewish wedding tunes for modern dance floors.

artists.name: Sound of Sichuan Ensemble
artists.bio: This ensemble highlights the vibrant folk melodies of Southwest China with erhu, pipa, bamboo flute, and percussion.

artists.name: Harlem Afrobeats Union
artists.bio: A transatlantic collective of Nigerian and Ghanaian musicians fusing Afrobeats, highlife, and New York jazz improvisation.

artists.name: Baltic Tide Choir
artists.bio: A 24-voice choir weaving together Estonian, Latvian, and Lithuanian folk songs with contemporary choral harmonies.

artists.name: Masala Brass Band
artists.bio: Blistering horns and dhol drums bring the sound of North Indian wedding processions to the street stages.

artists.name: Pacific Gamelan Project
artists.bio: A community orchestra dedicated to Central Javanese gamelan, presenting shimmering metal percussion and dance collaborations.

artists.name: Urban Bhangra Crew
artists.bio: High-energy bhangra dancers and live dhol drums bring Punjabi dance traditions into hip-hop influenced choreography.

artists.name: Desert Oud Trio
artists.bio: Three master oud players weave together improvisations rooted in Syrian, Iraqi, and Moroccan traditions.

artists.name: Rio Night Bossa Quartet
artists.bio: Soft vocals, nylon-string guitar, and subtle percussion deliver late-night bossa nova classics and contemporary tunes.

artists.name: Island Pan Orchestra
artists.bio: A steel pan orchestra playing calypso, soca, and classical favorites, rooted in Trinidadian carnival traditions.

artists.name: Nomad Didgeridoo Circle
artists.bio: A collective exploring deep drones and overtone singing inspired by didgeridoo traditions and global ambient music.

donation_funds.name: Youth Music Education
donation_funds.description: Supports year-round music classes, instrument libraries, and mentorship programs for local youth.

donation_funds.name: Community Arts Grants
donation_funds.description: Micro-grants for neighborhood cultural projects, pop-up performances, and community storytelling.

donation_funds.name: Sustainability Initiative
donation_funds.description: Funds zero-waste efforts, reusable service ware, and green power for festival stages.

donation_funds.name: Festival Accessibility Fund
donation_funds.description: Provides ASL interpreters, mobility services, and sliding-scale tickets for disabled and low-income attendees.

map_locations.name: Main Stage
map_locations.description: The central outdoor stage featuring headliner performances and opening ceremonies.

map_locations.name: River Stage
map_locations.description: Waterfront stage hosting intimate acoustic and world fusion sets.

map_locations.name: Plaza Stage
map_locations.description: City plaza stage focused on local bands and dance showcases.

map_locations.name: Grove Stage
map_locations.description: Shaded grove featuring quieter, acoustic, and choral performances.

map_locations.name: Kids Corner & Family Lawn
map_locations.description: Family-friendly area with crafts, storytime, and kids music performances.

map_locations.name: Global Dance Pavilion
map_locations.description: Covered dance floor for daytime workshops and evening social dances.

map_locations.name: Global Bites Food Court
map_locations.description: Cluster of international food trucks and stalls offering mains, desserts, and drinks.

map_locations.name: North Gate Entrance
map_locations.description: Primary entrance for ticketed guests coming from the light rail station.

map_locations.name: Festival Info Center
map_locations.description: Information booth for schedules, lost and found, and accessibility services.

map_locations.name: Central Restrooms
map_locations.description: Accessible restroom area with baby-changing stations.

map_locations.name: Sabor de Puebla
map_locations.description: Mexican street food stall serving vegetarian and meat mains like tacos, tortas, and mole bowls.

map_locations.name: Sweet Sitar Desserts
map_locations.description: Indian-inspired dessert stall offering gulab jamun, kulfi, and cardamom pastries.

map_locations.name: Chai & Beat Bar
map_locations.description: Drink stand featuring spiced chai, non-alcoholic cocktails, and global sodas, with a view of the Main Stage.

map_locations.name: Juice Junction
map_locations.description: Fresh juice and smoothie bar near the River Stage.

map_locations.name: Artisan Market Lane
map_locations.description: Row of local artisans selling crafts, instruments, and festival merchandise.

map_locations.name: Workshop Tent A
map_locations.description: Covered tent space hosting dance, drumming, and vocal workshops throughout the weekend.

ticket_types.name: 2-Day Weekend Pass - Adult GA
ticket_types.description: General admission access for one adult to all stages and activities on Saturday and Sunday.

ticket_types.name: 2-Day Weekend Pass - Child (6-12)
ticket_types.description: General admission for one child ages 6–12 on Saturday and Sunday when accompanied by a ticketed adult.

ticket_types.name: 2-Day Weekend Pass - Adult Plus Seating
ticket_types.description: Adult 2-day pass with access to reserved seating sections at the Main Stage.

ticket_types.name: 2-Day Weekend Pass - Child Plus Seating
ticket_types.description: Child 2-day pass with access to reserved family seating near the Main Stage.

ticket_types.name: VIP 2-Day Lounge Pass - Adult
ticket_types.description: Premium 2-day access for one adult including VIP viewing decks, lounge access, and dedicated entrance.

ticket_types.name: Single-Day Pass - Saturday Adult
ticket_types.description: General admission for one adult on Saturday only.

ticket_types.name: Single-Day Pass - Sunday Adult
ticket_types.description: General admission for one adult on Sunday only.

ticket_types.name: Single-Day Pass - Child (6-12)
ticket_types.description: General admission for one child ages 6–12 on any one festival day.

ticket_types.name: 2-Day Weekend Pass - Senior GA
ticket_types.description: Discounted 2-day general admission for seniors age 65 and over.

ticket_types.name: Dance Workshop Day Pass
ticket_types.description: Access to all scheduled dance workshops on a single festival day (does not include concert entry).

activities.name: Afro-Latin Partner Dance - Intermediate
activities.description: Build your turns, footwork, and musicality in this intermediate Afro-Latin partner dance class, blending salsa and kizomba basics.

activities.name: Bhangra Basics for Everyone
activities.description: High-energy Punjabi bhangra fundamentals with Urban Bhangra Crew, perfect for first-timers who want to jump into the evening sets.

activities.name: Friday Night Bollywood Party Dance
activities.description: Learn easy, high-impact Bollywood party choreography set to classic and modern hits.

activities.name: Middle Eastern Frame Drum Circle
activities.description: Explore basic rhythms on frame drums with guidance from Desert Oud Trio’s percussionist.

activities.name: Kids Global Drumming Circle
activities.description: A hands-on rhythm adventure where kids try djembes, shakers, and frame drums in a playful group circle.

activities.name: Global Art & Play Lab
activities.description: Make simple crafts inspired by Mexican papel picado, Ethiopian patterns, and Pacific Northwest motifs in a guided family session.

activities.name: Family Folk Dance Sampler
activities.description: Try simple circle dances from the Balkans, Middle East, and Latin America in a stroller-friendly session.

activities.name: Instrument Petting Zoo
activities.description: Drop-in station where kids and adults can try instruments like steel pans, ouds, and djembes with staff supervision.

activities.name: Taste of Javanese Gamelan
activities.description: Sit at the instruments of the Pacific Gamelan Project and learn a simple interlocking pattern.

activities.name: South Asian Tea Rituals & Stories
activities.description: Hear stories about chai culture across India and Pakistan while watching a live tea preparation demonstration.

activities.name: Youth DJ Lab: Global Beats
activities.description: Teens learn basic beat-matching and how to blend Afrobeats, reggaeton, and bhangra using festival-friendly tracks.

stages.name: Main Stage
stages.description: The primary festival stage hosting headliner performances and nightly finales.

stages.name: River Stage
stages.description: Intimate stage along the waterfront featuring acoustic, folk, and cross-cultural collaborations.

stages.name: Plaza Stage
stages.description: Urban plaza stage showcasing local bands, dance showcases, and daytime family programming.

stages.name: Grove Stage
stages.description: Shaded grove ideal for choral sets, gamelan, and quieter listening experiences.

ticket_tiers.name: Early Bird Adult GA
ticket_tiers.description: Discounted early-bird general admission for Saturday and Sunday.

ticket_tiers.name: Standard Adult GA
ticket_tiers.description: Standard-priced adult general admission for both days.

ticket_tiers.name: Late Purchase Adult GA
ticket_tiers.description: Last-minute 2-day GA purchase subject to availability.

ticket_tiers.name: Early Bird Child GA
ticket_tiers.description: Discounted child general admission for both days with a ticketed adult.

ticket_tiers.name: Standard Child GA
ticket_tiers.description: Standard-priced child general admission for Saturday and Sunday.

ticket_tiers.name: Reserved Plus Seating
ticket_tiers.description: Reserved seating section at the Main Stage for both festival days.

ticket_tiers.name: Premium Plus Seating
ticket_tiers.description: Closest reserved rows with dedicated host at the Main Stage.

ticket_tiers.name: Family Zone Plus Seating
ticket_tiers.description: Reserved family-friendly zone near the Main Stage.

ticket_tiers.name: Premium Family Plus Seating
ticket_tiers.description: Closer reserved rows in the family section with quick restroom access.

ticket_tiers.name: VIP Lounge Standard
ticket_tiers.description: VIP deck access, lounge seating, and complimentary soft drinks.

ticket_tiers.name: VIP Lounge Front Row
ticket_tiers.description: Front-row VIP deck seating with hosted bar and snacks.

ticket_tiers.name: Child Single-Day GA
ticket_tiers.description: Child ticket valid for one selected festival day.

ticket_tiers.name: Dance Workshop Day Pass
ticket_tiers.description: Access to all scheduled dance workshops on one festival day.

vendors.name: Sabor de Puebla
vendors.description: Street-style tacos, mole bowls, and vegetarian tinga plates inspired by family recipes from Puebla, Mexico.

vendors.name: Sweet Sitar Desserts
vendors.description: Gulab jamun, rose-cardamom cakes, and kulfi pops blending North and South Indian dessert traditions.

vendors.name: Chai & Beat Bar
vendors.description: Masala chai, iced hibiscus tea, and global mocktails served with a direct view of the Main Stage.

vendors.name: Asian Street Bites
vendors.description: Mix of Japanese, Thai, and Korean street snacks including dumplings, noodles, and bao.

vendors.name: Mediterranean Veggie Grill
vendors.description: Falafel wraps, grilled halloumi plates, and mezze platters with plenty of vegetarian mains.

vendors.name: Sapori di Roma Gelato
vendors.description: Small-batch Italian gelato with flavors like pistachio, stracciatella, and mango lassi.

vendors.name: Juice Junction
vendors.description: Cold-pressed juices and smoothies made from seasonal fruits and herbs near the River Stage.

vendors.name: Ethiopian Injera Hut
vendors.description: Injera platters with lentil wats, spiced greens, and mild stews ideal for sharing.

vendors.name: Island BBQ Smokehouse
vendors.description: Caribbean-inspired jerk plates, grilled veggies, and rice bowls with tropical sides.

vendors.name: Kimchi & BBQ Bowls
vendors.description: Korean rice bowls, kimchi fries, and tofu bulgogi options with customizable spice levels.

dishes.name: Veggie Rajas Tacos
dishes.description: Three soft tacos stuffed with roasted poblano strips, onions, crema, and queso fresco, served with salsa verde.

dishes.name: Mole Chicken Bowl
dishes.description: Slow-simmered chicken in rich poblano mole over rice with pickled onions and warm tortillas.

dishes.name: Falafel Feast Plate
dishes.description: Crispy falafel, herbed rice, chopped salad, hummus, and warm pita with tahini drizzle.

dishes.name: Grilled Halloumi Wrap
dishes.description: Char-grilled halloumi cheese wrapped with cucumber, tomato, olives, and lemon-garlic sauce.

dishes.name: Market Mezze Box
dishes.description: Sampler of hummus, baba ghanoush, olives, pickles, and fresh vegetables with grilled flatbread.

dishes.name: Veggie Injera Combo
dishes.description: Injera topped with a trio of lentil, chickpea, and collard green wats with mild berbere spice.

dishes.name: Doro Wat Injera Plate
dishes.description: Spicy chicken stew with hard-boiled egg served over injera with seasonal vegetable sides.

dishes.name: Tofu Bulgogi Bowl
dishes.description: Marinated grilled tofu over rice with kimchi, sesame spinach, and gochujang sauce.

dishes.name: Spicy Pork BBQ Bowl
dishes.description: Thin-sliced pork in spicy-sweet marinade with rice, kimchi, scallions, and sesame seeds.

dishes.name: Veggie Pad Thai Box
dishes.description: Rice noodles stir-fried with tofu, egg, peanuts, and tamarind sauce, topped with lime and herbs.

dishes.name: Street Gyoza Snack
dishes.description: Pan-fried dumplings with soy-chili dipping sauce.

dishes.name: Island Veggie Pineapple Plate
dishes.description: Grilled seasonal vegetables and sweet pineapple over coconut rice with jerk-spiced sauce on the side.

dishes.name: Gulab Jamun Cup
dishes.description: Warm milk-solid dumplings soaked in cardamom and rose syrup, served in a festival-friendly cup.

dishes.name: Mango Kulfi Pop
dishes.description: Frozen mango milk pop flavored with cardamom and saffron.

dishes.name: Pistachio Gelato Cup
dishes.description: Creamy pistachio gelato made in small batches and served in a compostable cup.

dishes.name: Espresso Affogato Gelato
dishes.description: Vanilla gelato drowned in a shot of hot espresso.

dishes.name: Spiced Masala Chai
dishes.description: Slow-brewed black tea with fresh ginger, cardamom, and cinnamon served hot or iced.

dishes.name: Tamarind Sparkling Cooler
dishes.description: Lightly sweetened tamarind and lime soda with a salted rim.

dishes.name: Green Detox Smoothie
dishes.description: Blend of kale, apple, cucumber, lemon, and mint with no added sugar.

dishes.name: Tropical Mango Smoothie
dishes.description: Mango, pineapple, and coconut milk blended into a creamy festival smoothie.

performances.name: Opening Night: Sol del Andes
performances.description: Festival opening set featuring soaring Andean melodies and electronic grooves.

performances.name: Midnight Qawwali Collective Live
performances.description: An ecstatic Sufi qawwali experience under the stars.

performances.name: Riverfront Bossa Night
performances.description: Laid-back bossa nova classics by the water.

performances.name: Plaza Samba Block Party
performances.description: Carnival rhythms and dancers turning the plaza into a parade route.

performances.name: Afternoon Gamelan in the Grove
performances.description: Shimmering Javanese gamelan with special dance guests.

performances.name: Evening Samba Carnaval
performances.description: High-energy samba batucada to kick off Saturday night.

performances.name: Masala Brass Night Parade
performances.description: Blazing North Indian brass band leading a roaming dance party.

performances.name: Island Pan Sunset Session
performances.description: Steel pan orchestra soundtracking the sunset over the river.

performances.name: Saturday Headliner: Midnight Qawwali
performances.description: Late-night qawwali set with extended improvisations.

performances.name: Late Night Afrobeats Block Party
performances.description: Afrobeats and highlife grooves to close out Saturday night.

performances.name: Tea House Folk Ensemble
performances.description: Delicate Sichuan folk melodies in an intimate riverfront setting.

performances.name: Cascadia Klezmer Dance Set
performances.description: Up-tempo klezmer tunes with easy circle dances taught on the spot.

performances.name: Baltic Choral Waves
performances.description: Layered harmonies and folk songs from across the Baltic region.

performances.name: Sunset Afrobeats Jam
performances.description: Dance-ready Afrobeats set as the sun goes down.

performances.name: Bossa Nova Nightcap
performances.description: Soft, swaying bossa tunes to close the weekend by the water.

performances.name: Nomad Ambient Closure
performances.description: Immersive didgeridoo drones and overtone singing in the darkened grove.
